utils__parent-narrative-safety__parent-n.only_suspected_prerequisite_gap_narrativ: Only suspected prerequisite gap; narrative states proof-level gap.
utils__parent-narrative-safety__parent-n.internal_taxonomy_token_leaked_into_pare: Internal taxonomy token leaked into parent copy - block.
utils__parent-narrative-safety__parent-n.realistic_thin_data_statistical_restrain: Realistic thin-data statistical restraint line - pass (info: safe thin caution).
utils__parent-narrative-safety__parent-n.thin_data_but_claims_determinability_sig: Thin data but claims determinability / significant weakness - warning.
utils__parent-narrative-safety__parent-n.acknowledges_lack_of_data_then_asserts_c: Acknowledges lack of data then asserts clear problem - warning.
utils__parent-narrative-safety__parent-n.thin_row_but_vague_narrative_without_exp: Thin row but vague narrative without explicit limited-data framing - warning.
utils__parent-narrative-safety__parent-n.despite_little_data_absolute_clarity_abo: Despite little data, absolute clarity about struggle - overconfidence + thin → block.
